mano_cua.result_summary: 需要 PostgreSQL + Redis + SMTP + NextAuth 后端服务。测试流程要求管理员登录、团队邀请，完全依赖后端。无法在本机独立运行。backend_risk 预期。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Requires PostgreSQL + Redis + SMTP + NextAuth backend services. Test flow requires admin login and team invitation, fully dependent on backend. Cannot run standalone. backend_risk as expected.
